claim: Gemini's browser control capability (direct screenshot + interaction) enables more accurate web task completion than API-only tools
actionable: When building agent tools for web automation, include browser screenshot + interaction (click, type) alongside API access for robustness

claim: Vision understanding combined with browser control allows models to interpret dynamic web content that APIs don't expose
actionable: Combine OCR/vision models with browser automation for sites where traditional web scraping is blocked or unreliable

claim: Browser use introduces latency and higher costs due to image processing; should be used selectively for complex interactive tasks
actionable: Use API-first approach and fall back to browser control only when APIs fail or content is JavaScript-rendered
